glyph.energy_manipulation.debug.descript: Prints the execution result of the connected glyph.
glyph.energy_manipulation.from_conversio: Get a value by converting from another value type.
glyph.energy_manipulation.operation.desc: Returns the result of an operation.
glyph.energy_manipulation.var_definition: The name of the variable (Must be unique within the scope of the glyph).
The type of value the variable will hold.
glyph.energy_manipulation.var_getter.des: Gets the value of a variable.
glyph.energy_manipulation.var_getter.nam: The name of the variable to get the value of.
glyph.energy_manipulation.var_setter.des: Sets the value of a variable.
glyph.energy_manipulation.var_setter.nam: The name of the variable to set the value of.
glyph.energy_manipulation.var_setter.val: The new value of the variable.
